content.speakerText: I'm heading out for a week-long conference. Can you monitor the team’s progress reports?
content.speakerTextCn: 我要去参加为期一周的会议，你能帮忙监控团队的进度报告吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course. Can you share the latest template and who to contact if there are issues?
I’ll keep an eye on them. Just let me know if there’s anything urgent.
I can help, but I’ll need access to the reporting system first.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应请求并提出合理需求
是否使用交接场景关键词（monitor, share, access, update）
是否语言流畅、逻辑清晰，体现专业责任感

content.scenarioHint: 你即将出差三天，需要请同事帮忙处理你的日常邮件和会议安排，主动提出交接安排以减轻对方负担。
content.speakerText: I'll be away for three days next week, so I'll forward all urgent emails to you and update the meeting calendar in advance.
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周要出差三天，我会把所有紧急邮件转给你，并提前更新会议日历。
expectedAnswers: Thanks, that’s really helpful—I’ll keep an eye on them.
Perfect, just let me know if anything urgent comes up.
You’re awesome for setting this up ahead of time.
Could you also confirm with the team that they’ve seen the updates?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了交接意图并主动说明准备动作
语言准确性：语法、时态和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'forward', 'update', 'urgent', 'calendar' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你即将出差，需要同事临时接手你的项目进度跟踪，主动说明你将如何准备交接材料以便对方顺利接手。
content.speakerText: I’ll be on travel next Monday to Wednesday, so I’ll update the project tracker with all current statuses and leave a quick summary in the team chat.
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周周一到周三出差，我会更新项目跟踪表，把当前所有状态标注清楚，并在团队聊天中留下简要说明。
expectedAnswers: That’s super clear—thanks for making it so easy!
Can you also highlight any pending decisions I need to follow up on?
Awesome, I’ll check the tracker first thing Monday.
Just tag me if anything needs my input before I leave.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了交接内容并主动提供支持信息
语言准确性：是否正确使用了时态、动词短语和职场术语
表达自然度：是否符合日常职场沟通的语气和节奏
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'update', 'tracker', 'status', 'summary', 'pending' 等关键表达
